message.content:
Look at these files and describe their visual design patterns in detail - the exact className values used for cards, headers, rows, badges, spacing, colors, typography:
1. /home/runner/workspace/client/src/pages/TenderFormBuilder.tsx - read the full JSX/render section
2. /home/runner/workspace/client/src/pages/CreateTender.tsx - read the JSX render section

I need to understand: how cards look, how sections are structured, how they style rows/lists, what colors/borders/spacing they use, any unique design elements. Give me specific className examples from the actual code.

content.text: I'll read both files to analyze their visual design patterns in detail.

Based on my analysis of both files, here's a detailed breakdown of the visual design patterns:

## TenderFormBuilder.tsx

**Container & Layout:**
- Main container: `"h-screen flex flex-col bg-gray-50 dark:bg-gray-950"`
- Header: `"flex-shrink-0 bg-white dark:bg-gray-900 border-b border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700 px-6 py-4"`

**Header Typography & Spacing:**
- Title: `"text-lg font-semibold text-gray-900 dark:text-white"`
- Subtitle: `"text-xs text-gray-500 dark:text-gray-400"`
- Logo with styling: `"h-10 cursor-pointer hover:opacity-80 transition-opacity"`
- Divider: `"h-6 w-px bg-gray-200 dark:bg-gray-700"`

**Primary Button Styling:**
- Continue button: `"bg-[#E25E45] hover:bg-[#d54d35] text-white"` (brand coral/orange)
- Uses `ArrowRight` icon with `"h-4 w-4 ml-2"`

**Sidebar Design:**
- Resize handle: `"w-1 hover:w-1.5 bg-gray-200 dark:bg-gray-700 hover:bg-[#E25E45] cursor-col-resize transition-all"`
- Hover effect with hidden element: `"absolute inset-y-0 -left-1 -right-1 group-hover:bg-[#E25E45]/10"`
- Animation: `motion.div` with `initial={{ width: 0 }}` and `animate={{ width: sidebarWidth + 4 }}`

---

## CreateTender.tsx

**Card Components:**
- Main card wrapper: `className="border-0 shadow-2xl"` (or `"shadow-xl"` for some contexts)
- Cards use gradient top border: `"h-1 bg-gradient-to-r from-[#E25E45] to-[#FF8A6B]"`

**Card Header:**
- Header section: `CardHeader className="pb-4"`
- Title styling: `CardTitle className="text-2xl font-bold"`
- Description: `CardDescription`
- Icon circle: `"h-12 w-12 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-[#E25E45] to-[#d54d35] flex items-center justify-center"`
- Icon inside: `"h-6 w-6 text-white"`

**Section Containers (rows/groups):**
- Field sections: `"p-4 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-gray-800/50 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700"`
- Essential fields grouping: `"space-y-6 p-6 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-gray-800/50 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700"`

**Section Headers with Numbering:**
- Numbered circles: `"flex items-center justify-center w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-[#E25E45] text-white text-xs font-bold"` (contains "1", "2", etc.)
- Label text: `"text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900 dark:text-white mb-4 flex items-center gap-2"`
- Parent: `<h3>`

**Badges/Pills:**
- Voice note badge: `"inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-[#E25E45]/10 text-[#E25E45]"`
- Video badge: `"inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 dark:bg-blue-900/30 dark:text-blue-400"`

**Alert Boxes:**
- Alert container: `className="bg-blue-50 dark:bg-blue-950/30 border-blue-200 dark:border-blue-800"`
- Icon: `"h-4 w-4 text-blue-600"` (inside alert)
- Description text: `"text-blue-900 dark:text-blue-100"`

**Form Section with Advanced Toggle:**
- Advanced section: `"space-y-6 p-6 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-gray-800/50 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700"`
- Toggle button: `variant="ghost"` with `className="w-full justify-between text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground px-0"`
- Chevron icons: `ChevronUp/ChevronDown` with `"h-4 w-4"`

**Input Fields:**
- Label: `FormLabel className="text-base font-semibold"` (or `"text-sm font-semibold"`)
- Uses custom components: `SmartInput`, `SmartTextarea`
- Date picker trigger button: `variant="outline"` with `className={cn("justify-start text-left font-normal", !dateValue && "text-muted-foreground")}`

**Success State Card:**
- Success container: `"min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-50 to-gray-100 dark:from-gray-900 dark:to-gray-800 py-12 px-4"`
- Success icon circle: `"inline-flex items-center justify-center w-20 h-20 rounded-full bg-green-100 dark:bg-green-900/30"`
- Check icon: `"h-10 w-10 text-green-600 dark:text-green-400"`
- Title: `"text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-white mb-2"`

**Welcome Screen:**
- Background: `"relative min-h-screen bg-white dark:bg-neutral-950 overflow-hidden flex items-center justify-center p-4"`
- Uses `FlickeringGrid` background component with coral color: `color={`rgb(${226}, ${94}, ${69})`}`
- Welcome text: `"text-4xl font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-white"`
- Subtitle: `"text-lg text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400"`

**Primary Buttons:**
- Primary action: `className="w-full bg-[#E25E45] hover:bg-[#d54d35] text-white font-semibold text-base py-6"`
- Uses icon with text: `<Sparkles className="h-5 w-5 mr-2" />`

**Action Rows:**
- Button groups: `"flex gap-3 pt-6 border-t border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700"`

---

## Key Design Patterns Summary

**Color Scheme:**
- Brand color: `#E25E45` (coral/orange) and hover state `#d54d35` (darker coral)
- Accent gradient: `#FF8A6B` (lighter coral) 
- Neutral backgrounds: `gray-50/gray-950` (light/dark mode)
- Blues for info/alerts: `blue-50/blue-100/blue-900`

**Spacing:**
- Padding: `p-4`, `p-6`, `px-6 py-4`
- Gaps: `gap-2`, `gap-3`, `gap-4`
- Margins: `mb-1`, `mb-2`, `mb-4`, `mb-8`

**Typography:**
- Large titles: `text-3xl`, `text-2xl` with `font-bold`
- Section headers: `text-lg font-semibold`
- Form labels: `text-base font-semibold` or `text-sm font-semibold`
- Metadata: `text-xs`, `text-sm`

**Borders & Shadows:**
- Subtle borders: `border border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700`
- Card shadows: `shadow-xl`, `shadow-2xl`
- No borders on cards: `border-0`
- Gradient top borders: `h-1 bg-gradient-to-r from-[#E25E45] to-[#FF8A6B]`
